function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0) { not lib(relation_basic).is_transitive[T0](x0) or forall(x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x3) or x0(x1, x3) } = true } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not lib(relation_basic).is_transitive[T0](x0) or forall(x3: T0) { not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x3) or x0(x1, x3) } = true } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not (x0(x1, x2) and x0(x2, x3) and not x0(x1, x3)) or not lib(relation_basic).is_transitive[T0](x0) } }
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { (x0 <= x1 or x2 <= x1) = x0.min(x2) <= x1 } }
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0) { (not x0 <= x1 or not x0 >= x1) = (x0 != x1) } }
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 != x1 or (x0 <= x1 and x0 >= x1) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not lib(relation_basic).is_reflexive[T0](x0) or lib(relation_basic).relation_reflexive_closure[T0](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1, x2) } }
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder] { forall(x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { forall(x2: T0) { not x0(x2) or x2 <= x1 } = lib(order).is_upper_bound[T0](x0, x1) } }
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder] { forall(x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { not forall(x2: T0) { not x0(x2) or x2 <= x1 } or lib(order).is_upper_bound[T0](x0, x1) } }
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder] { forall(x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { not lib(order).is_upper_bound[T0](x0, x1) or forall(x2: T0) { not x0(x2) or x2 <= x1 } = true } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x2: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x3: T0, x4: T0) { lib(relation_basic).relation_union[T0, T0](lib(relation_transport).relation_pullback[T0, T1](x0, x1), lib(relation_transport).relation_pullback[T0, T1](x0, x2), x3, x4) = lib(relation_transport).relation_pullback[T0, T1](x0, lib(relation_basic).relation_union[T1, T1](x1, x2), x3, x4) } }

function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { (lib(relation_basic).is_reflexive[T0](x0) and lib(relation_basic).is_symmetric[T0](x0) and lib(relation_basic).is_transitive[T0](x0)) = lib(relation_basic).is_equivalence[T0](x0) } }

function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not (lib(relation_basic).is_reflexive[T0](x0) and lib(relation_basic).is_symmetric[T0](x0) and lib(relation_basic).is_transitive[T0](x0)) or lib(relation_basic).is_equivalence[T0](x0) } }

function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not lib(relation_basic).is_equivalence[T0](x0) or (lib(relation_basic).is_reflexive[T0](x0) and lib(relation_basic).is_symmetric[T0](x0) and lib(relation_basic).is_transitive[T0](x0)) } }
not commute(x, y) or false = true
not commute(x, y)
